purpose_string: Replace prompt-only gait timing with the exact actionless endpoint plus four deterministic browser-rendered single-hoof swing-apex guides after v8 and every v9 seed failed the four-beat hoof-contact order gate.

predecessor_experiment_object.result_string: All three prompt-only candidates failed release-blocking Horse gait QA; another seed-only series is not authorized.

positive_prompt_string: Locked-camera inverse skeletal fitting reference of the exact horse in the immutable actionless RGB endpoint. Preserve one identical horse, its geometry, proportions, materials, four persistent legs and four compact hooves. Frame 0 is the supplied default actionless pose and frame 48 is byte-identical. Follow the four browser RGB swing-apex guides as authoritative motion constraints in this exact order: hind-left hoof alone at frame 6, fore-left hoof alone at frame 18, hind-right hoof alone at frame 30, fore-right hoof alone at frame 42. Interpolate one smooth anatomically correct four-beat walk cycle in place through those poses. Every non-swing hoof remains planted; there is no paired swing, net translation, camera motion or seam pause.
negative_prompt_string: camera movement, crop, scene cut, duplicate horse, identity change, extra limb, missing limb, paired hoof swing, diagonal pair, lateral pair, trot, pace, hop, bound, gallop, suspension phase, foot sliding, hoof skating, ground penetration, broken joint, changing segment length, rubber limb, curled distal limb, hoof morphing, material change, flicker, endpoint freeze, text, watermark
controlled_variable_string: The generation seed, model, prompt family, actionless reference, resolution and endpoint strengths remain fixed from v9 candidate A; the material change is browser RGB conditioning for four explicitly separated single-hoof swing apexes.
fixed_factors_array: same immutable actionless Horse reference at frames 0 and 48
same pinned LTX 19B FP8 checkpoint and static-camera LoRA
no Blender and no unavailable control model
manual_acceptance_gates_array: frame 0 PNG SHA-256 equals the immutable actionless reference_rgb SHA-256
all four browser swing-apex PNGs show exactly one lifted hoof in the required order
all six guide PNGs pass visual pose review before LTX submission
one persistent horse with four persistent compact hooves
no paired swing frames and exactly three planted supporting hooves at each swing guide
TAPNext gait QA orderAccepted and overlapAccepted are both true
candidate remains generated_not_approved until browser fitting and visual QA pass

generation_authorization_object.required_next_action_string: Runtime authorization must exactly match this immutable experiment id.
